column1: dioscorea-villosa|Tea|Wild Yam Tea is a herbal infusion made from the dried roots of a perennial plant known as Dioscorea villosa
column2: commonly referred to as Colic Root or Wild Yarn
column3: which has been used in various medicinal practices due to its potential health benefits.

column1: dioscorea-villosa|Tincture|Wild Yam Tincture is an extract from Dioscorea villosa
column2: a plant also known as Colic Root
column3: used medicinally due to its phytoestrogen content that mimics the effects of estrogen in the body
column4: helping to manage various menopausal symptoms and hormone-related health concerns.

column1: dioscorea-villosa|Poultice|Wild Yam Poultice is a traditional healing remedy
column2: typically created from crushed wild yam roots and applied over inflamed or injured areas of the body to soothe pain and speed up recovery.
